title: Skelaymore
body:
# Skelaymore

📜 Description

**Skelaymore** is a brand-new evolution of **Marowak**, brought to life with stunning artwork by *Laser "Lizard" LLUIS*. 

Originally debuting on the **Cobblemon Dystoria Server**, Skelaymore quickly became a fan favorite thanks to its unique design, lore, and Dystoria-exclusive custom moves and abilities.

This datapack makes Skelaymore officially available for everyone to enjoy!

⚠️ *Note:* This release **does not include** the Dystoria-exclusive custom moves or abilities those remain server-only content.
